params.name: Basse Yutz Flagons
params.description:
On Jun 26, 1927 AD, a worker accidentally discovered a pair of flagons while digging the ground in France.
The Basse Yutz Flagons were named after the location of its discovery. Through this pair of wine flagons, people can learn about the life of the Nordic people from two thousand and five hundred years ago. In that period, the Nordic people lived in small communities and mastered some complex crafts of metal processing. The flagon's material suggests that they had traded with other regions …
